name: Baby Care
description: Professional babysitting service for children. Our trained caregivers ensure complete safety, engaging playtime activities, proper attention to your child's needs, and a nurturing environment that supports emotional and physical development throughout their stay.

name: Elderly Care
description: Compassionate care for elderly people including daily assistance, companionship, medication reminders, help with mobility, personal hygiene, and overall support to maintain comfort, dignity, and quality of life in a safe and loving environment.

name: Sick People Care
description: Home care service for sick patients providing continuous health monitoring, timely medicine administration, basic nursing assistance, emotional support, and a clean, comfortable environment to promote recovery and well-being while reducing the stress on families.

name: Special Needs Care
description: Expert caregivers trained to assist individuals with special needs, providing personalized support, structured routines, emotional encouragement, and safety measures tailored to each person's unique requirements, promoting independence and a higher quality of life.

name: Night Care Service
description: Reliable overnight caregiving for children, elderly, or patients, ensuring their safety, comfort, and peace of mind throughout the night. Services include supervision, assistance with nighttime routines, emergency readiness, and attentive care to support uninterrupted rest for both the individual and their family.

name: Postpartum Care
description: Professional care for mothers and newborns after delivery, including feeding support, health monitoring, rest facilitation, emotional guidance, assistance with newborn routines, and educational advice to ensure the well-being, recovery, and bonding of both mother and child during the crucial postpartum period.
